title: hypericum leprosum
intro: Hypericum leprosum, also known as St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant native to the Americas and Europe, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant contains hyperforin and hypericin, compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. St. John's Wort has been used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, depression, and skin irritations, due to its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies.
